message.timestopreborn.void_craft.time_c: You offered the spoils of the world to the void, and thus grasped the truth of time
timestopreborn.configuration.title: Time Stop: Reborn Configuration
timestopreborn.configuration.visual.tool: Client-side visual settings during time stop.
timestopreborn.configuration.visual.enab: Whether to keep a post-processing filter active for the whole time stop.
Play the rewind startup animation when time stop begins. Without post effect, only the animation plays and then clears.
timestopreborn.configuration.visual.star: Per-frame increment of the rewind shader time uniform.
timestopreborn.configuration.visual.post: Resource location of the post chain JSON loaded during time stop.
timestopreborn.configuration.gameplay.on: Only Triggerer Can Move During Time Stop (This config may not work)
When enabled, only the player who triggered time stop can move during time stop.
